args.content:
# Paris vs Rome: Top Tourist Attractions

## Paris

1. [Eiffel Tower](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eiffel_Tower)
   - Name: Eiffel Tower
   - Description: The Eiffel Tower (/ ˈaɪfəl / ⓘ EYE-fəl; French: Tour Eiffel [tuʁ ɛfɛl] ⓘ) is a lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France. It is named after the engineer Gustave Eiffel, whose company designed and built the tower from 1887 to 1889.
   - Source: task_001.output
2. [Louvre Museum](url)
   - Name: Louvre Museum
   - Description: The Louvre Museum is a former royal palace located on the Right Bank of the Seine in Paris, France. It is one of the world's largest and most visited museums.
   - Source: task_001.output
3. [Arc de Triomphe](url)
   - Name: Arc de Triomphe
   - Description: The Arc de Triomphe is a triumphal arch located in the center of the Place Charles de Gaulle in Paris, France. It honors the soldiers who fought and died for France.
   - Source: task_001.output

## Rome

1. [Colosseum](https://www.tripadvisor.com/Attraction_Review-g187879-d222356-Reviews-Colosseum-Rome_Lazio.html)
   - Name: Colosseum
   - Description: The largest amphitheater in the Roman Empire, built in the 1st century AD,
   - Source: task_002.output
2. [Trevi Fountain](url)
   - Name: Trevi Fountain
   - Description: The Trevi Fountain is a beautiful baroque fountain located in the heart of Rome, Italy. It is one of the city's most famous landmarks.
   - Source: search results
3. [Cooking Class](url)
   - Name: Cooking Class
   - Description: Take a cooking class and learn how to make traditional Italian dishes.
   - Source: search results
